original_image_tags: A scan of the reverse side of a document page. The paper is light-colored with two hole-punch marks at the top center. The page shows faint, reversed text visible through the paper from the front side. At the bottom center, there is a blue ink stamp. At the bottom left corner, there is a handwritten notation in pencil or light ink.

elements.description: An upside-down blue ink stamp reading 'REC'D INSPECTOR ESP. N.L. C.R. BRANCH' followed by 'OCT 2 10 47 AM 62'. Faint, illegible typed text is visible in the background through the paper. Two hole-punch marks are visible at the top edge, and handwritten text '182' is visible in the bottom left corner.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual elements: a faint reversed text background, a blue ink stamp at the bottom center, a handwritten notation at the bottom left, and two hole-punch marks at the top, with no contradictions on specific quoted text.
